\begin{align*} f_i(\bx)-f_i(\bx_0)=\amp f_i(x_1, x_2)-f_i(x_1, 0)+f_i(x_1, 0)-f_i(0, 0)\\ = \amp \frac{\partial f_i}{\partial x_2}(x_1, b)x_2+ \frac{\partial f_i}{\partial x_1}(a, 0)x_1\\ = \amp \frac{\partial f_i}{\partial x_1}(0, 0) x_1 + \frac{\partial f_i}{\partial x_2}(0, 0)x_2\\ \amp + \left[ \frac{\partial f_i}{\partial x_1}(a, 0)-\frac{\partial f_i}{\partial x_1}(0, 0)\right] x_1+ \left[ \frac{\partial f_i}{\partial x_2}(x_1, b)- \frac{\partial f_i}{\partial x_2}(0, 0)\right] x_2 \end{align*}
in-context
